epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: EWGSOP2: low muscle strength (grip) + low muscle quantity (DXA/BIA) and/or low physical performance (gait speed/SPPB)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; improves with resistance exercise and nutrition support

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: DXA/BIA access limited; many cases clinically recognized via functional decline
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Resistance training, protein optimization, vitamin D when deficient, and chronic disease management
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to structured exercise programs and nutrition support
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost exercise interventions can be delivered through community/primary care programs
